title: BHU Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of BHU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BHU Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.Sc. degree in Botany / Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Environmental Science / Life Science / Bioscience or any other allied subject with at least 55% or equivalent marks. Candidates with higher qualifications may also apply.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU Technical Assistant (TA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BHU Technical Assistant (TA) recruitment is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant (TA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Botany, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Environmental Science, Life Science, Bioscience, or any allied subject with at least 55% marks. Higher qualifications are also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant (TA) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Technical Assistant (TA) post will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month along with 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Technical Assistant (TA) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant (TA) post involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Technical Assistant (TA) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Technical Assistant (TA) in Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BHU Technical Assistant (TA) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Banaras Hindu University located?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this BHU Technical Assistant (TA) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Technical Assistant (TA) position at Banaras Hindu University is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the Technical Assistant (TA) post?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits, nor does it mention any age relaxations for this particular recruitment.
